examples: Can divergence occur if no physical barriers are in place to separate individuals who continue to live and reproduce in the same habitat?
Certainly, the limitations imposed by manual labor and the locally available materials of mud-brick and timber necessitated a divergence from the original European church model.
A minimal error or deviation may result in wide divergence.
So always start with divergence first, and then schedule a different meeting for the convergence process.
To Hsu, culture explains the growing divergence between ethnic markets and those of the general population.
